creator: eddietwo@naugabutt.lcs.mit.edu
text:
Hi Mike et al,

I'm interested in the fixes in this branched version of t1utils. If someone
maintaining ttf2pt1 or whatever could send me the relevant t1asm.c, great.
I suggest that the merged t1asm should live in the t1utils package because
it came from there originally and isn't ttf-specific.

\love,
ed
